llms_txt_accuracy_check.wins_json_parse_error: FLAGGED: wins.json fails JSON.parse at position 418561 (line 1411, column 2374 — inside a detail_extra field). Likely an unescaped double-quote or angle bracket in HTML content. Regex analysis confirms 71 verdict fields are present and the data content is structurally intact. However, this breaks any build step that programmatically reads wins.json (build.js, test.js). Routing to decider.
llms_txt_accuracy_check.verdict: docs/llms.txt content is accurate based on regex verification. wins.json parse error does not affect the deployed llms.txt (already built), but breaks future build runs.

issues_for_decider.issue: wins.json fails JSON parsing at position 418561 (line 1411 column 2374). SyntaxError: Expected ',' or '}' after property value. Likely an unescaped double-quote or HTML character in a detail_extra string field around WIN-064's long prose block. Regex analysis confirms 71 verdict fields present — data is intact but the file is not valid JSON. build.js, test.js, and any agent that reads wins.json will fail until fixed.
issues_for_decider.suggested_fix: Run: node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data/wins.json','utf8'))" to locate the exact character. Fix the unescaped character (escape quotes, replace < > with < >, etc.). The error is near the WIN-064 detail_extra field (extensive P-wave shadow zone prose). Validate fix with test.js before committing.
